problem id: 5dfea8b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11111011 -> 01111111
  01110010 -> 00101111
  11110110 -> 10011110
  01001110 -> 10101101
  10100010 -> 00010111
  11100010 -> 00011111
  01001100 -> 01101101
  10110111 -> 11110110
  00101010 -> 00110101

query: 11011100
predicted answer: 01011011
